0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h1","children":"Sleep Consolidation"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["Mnemosyne's explicit consolidation function that promotes aged Working Memory entries to Episodic Memory, inspired by human sleep's role in memory consolidation. In v3.0+ this also integrates with MEMORIA structured tables — fact extraction feeds ",["$","code",null,{"children":"memoria_facts"}]," and ",["$","code",null,{"children":"memoria_timelines"}]," during ",["$","code",null,{"children":"remember()"}],", and these tables persist independently of the Working Memory lifecycle."]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"What Sleep Does"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"During each consolidation cycle, Mnemosyne:"}],"\n",["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Scans"}]," Working Memory for entries older than TTL/2 (12 hours by default)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Groups"}]," candidates by ",["$","code",null,{"children":"source"}]]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Summarizes"}]," each group via local LLM (MiniCPM5-1B GGUF) or AAAK text substitution"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Promotes"}]," summaries to Episodic Memory (with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"summary_of"}]," tracking originals)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Marks"}]," original Working Memory entries as consolidated (MEMORIA ",["$","code",null,{"children":"memoria_*"}]," tables persist independently)"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Trigger Conditions"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Consolidation triggers on:"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Age threshold"}],": When Working Memory entries exceed TTL/2 (default: 12 hours with 24h TTL)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Explicit call"}],": ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mem.sleep()"}]," for manual consolidation"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Consolidation Pipeline"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"chart":"\nflowchart LR\n  A[Working Memory] -->|age > TTL/2| B[Candidate Selection]\n  B -->|group by source| C[Group Entries]\n  C -->|summarize| D[LLM or AAAK]\n  D -->|promote| E[Episodic Memory]\n  C -->|mark originals| F[Mark as Consolidated]\n"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Step-by-Step"}],"\n",["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Candidate selection"}],": Find all Working Memory entries where ",["$","code",null,{"children":"created_at < now - TTL/2"}]]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Group by source"}],": Cluster candidates by their ",["$","code",null,{"children":"source"}]," field"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Summarize"}]," each group using the LLM fallback chain:","\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Host backend"}]," (Hermes auxiliary client) — when ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_HOST_LLM_ENABLED=true"}]]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Remote OpenAI-compatible API"}]," — if ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_LLM_BASE_URL"}]," is set"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Local LLM"}]," (MiniCPM5-1B GGUF) — offline, no API key"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"AAAK encoding"}]," — keyword-based text substitution as final fallback"]}],"\n"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Promote"}],": Insert summary into ",["$","code",null,{"children":"episodic_memory"}]," with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"summary_of"}]," referencing the original IDs"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Mark"}],": Set ",["$","code",null,{"children":"consolidated_at"}]," on the original entries in ",["$","code",null,{"children":"working_memory"}]," (rows remain recallable)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Log"}],": Record the consolidation in ",["$","code",null,{"children":"consolidation_log"}]]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Retention Values"}],"\n",["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":["$L4","$L5","$L6"]}]}],"$L7"]}],"\n","$L8","\n","$L9","\n","$La","\n","$Lb"],["$Lc"],"$Ld"]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"zHG3ZR8juPPx4CXLmq1-_"}
4:["$","th",null,{"children":"Parameter"}]
5:["$","th",null,{"children":"Default"}]
6:["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]

b:["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-info","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$Le",null,{"iconNode":[["circle",{"cx":"12","cy":"12","r":"10","key":"1mglay"}],["path",{"d":"M12 16v-4","key":"1dtifu"}],["path",{"d":"M12 8h.01","key":"e9boi3"}]],"className":"lucide-info shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"Performance Impact"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":["Sleep consolidation is synchronous — call ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mem.sleep()"}]," at idle times or after heavy ingestion. The method blocks until consolidation completes."]}]}]]}]]}]}]
